items.title: Netanyahu says Israel 'acted alone' in attack on Iranian gas field
items.dek: Speaking at a news conference, the Israeli leader said Trump had requested that there be no further such attacks.
items.body: Speaking at a news conference, the Israeli leader said Trump had requested that there be no further such attacks.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Bachelorette's new season pulled after Taylor Frankie Paul abuse allegations
items.dek: The decision comes after footage emerged appearing to show Taylor Frankie Paul in an altercation with her ex-partner.
items.body: The decision comes after footage emerged appearing to show Taylor Frankie Paul in an altercation with her ex-partner.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Teenager among first to be executed over Iran's anti-government protests
items.dek: Saleh Mohammadi, a member of Iran's national wrestling team, was found guilty of killing police officers alongside two other men, state media say.
items.body: Saleh Mohammadi, a member of Iran's national wrestling team, was found guilty of killing police officers alongside two other men, state media say.
items.author: IriLine Desk
